arts.sum: Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Van de Ven, Udogie; Bentancur, Sarr, Maddison; Johnson, Solanke, Son. Spurs have certainly been given some welcome news regarding Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke going into this weekend's North London Derby.
